#  Mobility and transportation 
  * [ Capabilities ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/industries/mobility-transport#anc01)
  * [ Insights ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/industries/mobility-transport#anc02)
  * [ Customer stories ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/industries/mobility-transport#anc03)


In the mobility sector, market competition is growing fiercer, owing to the wave of digital transformation. To succeed, companies must gather and effectively leverage data to innovate their products and revolutionize their logistics operations. Fujitsu offers digital twin solutions and robust security measures designed to expedite digital transformation within the mobility industry, and contribute to the realization of a future mobility society centered around human needs.
## Capabilities
Connected car
We facilitate the advancement of connected automobiles and the implementation of V2X technology, connecting vehicles to their drivers and surroundings. We also offer comprehensive security protocols and operational management services.
Innovation in transport
We offer mobility industry solutions harnessing ICT technology for seamless data collection, connectivity, and utilization. This enhanced data management facilitates efficient matching, leading to improved convenience and operational efficiency.
Logistics transformation
We deploy a logistics DX strategy aimed at optimizing logistics performance in the mobility industry.
## Insights
**Space Weather Prediction: A Future Powered by Explainable AI**
Imagine checking the space weather forecast just as routinely as you check the weather on Earth: "Clear skies around Earth today, with a potential alert for high-energy particles and X-rays in a few days." This future may be closer than we think.  
  
Space weather refers to the conditions in space influenced by solar flares -explosive phenomena on the Sun's surface. Depending on their magnitude, solar flares can disrupt satellites, impacting economic activities on Earth (Figure 1). They also pose significant radiation risks to astronauts, complicating manned missions like lunar exploration.
[ Read Space Weather Prediction: A Future Powered by Explainable AI ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/insight/tl-space-weather-prediction-20250513)
![Sonneneruption](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/insight/tl-space-weather-prediction-20250513/kv-space-weather-prediction-936x578.jpg?h=578&iar=0&w=936&rev=c36c2e5e70aa4a6fac1883790cd9ef1e&hash=C79B579FAC923FD0BDE53E260D73D902)
[ Delivering Value in a World with AI Agents: A Fujitsu and Microsoft Collaboration](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/insight/tl-ms-ai-tour-20250423)
![Fujitsu Takabayashi, Microsoft Japan Tomoyama](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/insight/tl-ms-ai-tour-20250423/kv-tl-ms-ai-tour-936x578.jpg?rev=745d532f63e1404c8cabe2f51bf0f073&hash=21FE2036C262A2BE9A07B368516C90C6)
[ How Has the COVID-19 Pandemic Changed the Future?](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/about/vision/leadership-challenges/20-mobility)
![Cityscape with a network of interconnected people icons overlaid, representing connectivity and communication.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/about/vision/leadership-challenges/20-mobility/kv-20-mobility-936x578.jpg?rev=891124623ad84949b2e9ec646282943b&hash=FEB9E385CE94B302A0E73DF80CFA0FB7)
[ From clogged ports to efficient supply chains: how AI is transforming the maritime industry](https://corporate-blog.global.fujitsu.com/fgb/2024-01-15/01)
![Container ship at sea from above](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/redirects/corporate-blog/corporate-blog_global_fujitsu_com_fgb_2024-01-15_01-936x578.jpg?rev=d0d777de9c0d4d4f877c7dcbfa0f362a&hash=1C95158E300E0A9A34EFF3C241DA69DE)
## Customer stories
![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/customer-stories/hcs-sst-20251028/kv-hcs-sst-20251028-936x578.jpg?h=578&iar=0&w=935&rev=71bb3956311f40adbe5789a1481e243d&hash=9368FD0998263534DF81583CA413DE5A)
Innovating Logistics for a Sustainable World
Yamato’s home delivery service, known as ‘Takkyubin’ in Japan, celebrates 50 years in 2026. Since 2018, Yamato has partnered with Fujitsu to participate in the Japanese government’s Strategic Innovation Promotion Program (SIP), a national initiative led by the Cabinet Office. United by a shared vision for sustainable logistics, the two companies co-developed a smart logistics data platform that integrates logistics and commercial flow.
[ Read the logistics innovation story ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories/hcs-sst-20251028)
[ Japan Airlines](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories/cs-jal-en-20251021)
This AI supports cabin crew in streamlining in-flight reporting tasks, significantly reducing the time required to create handover reports.
![Two businesswomen walking in an airport](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/customer-stories/cs-jal-20251021/kv-cs-jal-20251021-936x578.jpg?rev=70948f8e00f3443eb01a514901b57dbb&hash=ECA9FFD86BC00AD152C9CB71BBD96E69)
[ Emovis - Abertis Mobility Services](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories/cs-abertis-mobility-services-20240916)
Emovis - Abertis Mobility Services (AMS) collaborates with Fujitsu for more innovative, smarter and connected roads. Fujitsu’s Cloud Service for Microsoft Azure enables a connected, intelligent and transformed business environment.
![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/customer-stories/cs-abertis-mobility-services-20240916/cs-abertis-mobility-services-20240916-809x500.jpg?rev=d697d645388047b196740f78dc7b3376&hash=4FE66BCDB72C3EC67D71CE2E59C25AFB)
[ Mobility customer stories ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories?tags=Mobility)
